phrase: Think about the last time you ate a bowl of rice.
visual: a simple bowl of rice with two thin curls of steam rising above it, centered

phrase: You didn't wonder who grew it.
visual: the same bowl of rice with a thin question mark floating above it, centered

phrase: Almost no one does.
visual: the character giving a small shrug, arms slightly out, a small empty thought bubble above its head

phrase: Here's the number that changed how I think about that.
visual: a plain blank rectangular card outlined in thin lines, centered, quiet and minimal

phrase: In America, the average farmer is 58 years old.
visual: the number 58 only — two clear bold digits side by side filling the center, nothing else at all

phrase: More than 40% are over 65.
visual: a simple thin-line pie chart circle with a little under half shaded a flat color, centered, no text

phrase: In Thailand,
visual: a rice paddy landscape, a flat pale green field below a thin horizon, pale flat sky above, no people, calm and open

phrase: where rice paddies once passed from parent to child like a birthright,
visual: two characters, a taller one gently handing a small seedling down to a shorter one, side by side

phrase: the story is the same.
visual: two identical simple farm vignettes side by side with a thin equals sign between them, no text

phrase: The land is aging, the children left.
visual: a quiet open field with two small figures walking away toward the right edge, a calm wide scene

phrase: So who grows the food next?
visual: a thin question mark with a small seedling beside it, centered

phrase: The answer starts with math.
visual: a few simple thin math symbols — plus, minus, equals — spaced across the white, minimal

phrase: Farming costs years,
visual: three simple calendar pages in a row, each crossed with a thin X

phrase: years of weather that doesn't cooperate,
visual: a flat farm field under one simple rain cloud with thin rain lines, no people, flat grey sky

phrase: yields that don't arrive,
visual: a simple empty woven basket, centered

phrase: seasons you gamble on and lose.
visual: a single simple die showing a low number, centered

phrase: And the income?
visual: a simple open empty wallet with a thin question mark above it, centered

phrase: It arrives by harvest,
visual: a field of simple golden grain stalks below a warm pale sky, no people, calm

phrase: not by paycheck, not on time.
visual: a simple clock face with a thin X drawn over it, centered

phrase: A young person who moves from a Thai village to Bangkok can earn dramatically more in a year,
visual: a simple farmhouse on the left and simple tall city buildings on the right, one small figure walking between them

phrase: not because cities are better,
visual: the character with a small uncertain shrug, arms slightly raised

phrase: because a paycheck is something you can point to.
visual: a thin hand pointing at a plain rectangle (a paycheck) on the right, no text

phrase: A failed harvest is something you absorb alone.
visual: the character standing alone and slightly slumped in an open field, a calm lonely scene

phrase: But the math isn't the whole story.
visual: a thin equals sign followed by a question mark, centered

phrase: Even if the income was fair,
visual: a simple thin-line balance scale, level and even, centered

phrase: there's something else, an invisible tax.
visual: the character standing upright with a faint thin dashed weight resting on its shoulders

phrase: In Thailand and across most of Southeast Asia,
visual: a simple thin outline of the Southeast Asia region on white, no labels, no people

phrase: the farm is where you came from,
visual: a simple farm on the left side of the frame, calm open space to the right, no people

phrase: not where you're going.
visual: the character walking toward the right, open space ahead

phrase: Generations of parents who worked the soil sent their children to school with one unspoken prayer.
visual: two characters working the soil on the left, and a child character walking toward a simple school on the right

phrase: Please, not this.
visual: a simple speech bubble with three dots, and a small farm icon with a thin X beside it

phrase: Degrees meant desks,
visual: a rolled diploma, a thin arrow, and a simple desk, evenly spaced

phrase: desks meant something better.
visual: the character standing calmly beside a simple desk with a small laptop on it

phrase: There's no LinkedIn profile for organic farmer,
visual: a simple phone outline showing a small carrot icon with a thin X over it, no text

phrase: no performance review for growing food without chemicals.
visual: a simple grid of empty boxes with one small carrot doodle in a corner box, no text

phrase: The work that I do, the 5am wake-ups,
visual: a dark pre-dawn field with a thin crescent moon, one small figure standing in it, a quiet wide scene

phrase: the soil under my fingernails,
visual: a pair of open hands held palms up with a few small soil specks on the fingertips, centered

phrase: the rows I walk before breakfast,
visual: simple crop-row lines stretching to the horizon, one small figure walking among them, calm pale sky

phrase: none of it shows in the metrics the modern world uses to measure a life.
visual: a simple thin line graph with rising lines, but one line stays flat along the bottom, no text

phrase: We built a world that rewards what it can count, and what you grow in the ground is very hard to count.
visual: a few simple tally marks beside a small stack of coins, centered, no text

phrase: I am one of the people who stayed.
visual: the character standing calm and still alone in an open field, a quiet scene

phrase: Every morning I walk our rows,
visual: dawn crop rows with a thin warm band at the horizon, one small figure walking, calm and open

phrase: check the soil with my hands,
visual: the character standing and looking down at its two cupped hands, holding a little soil

phrase: smell the moisture before the rows come into focus.
visual: a misty pre-dawn field with a few thin horizontal mist lines over faint rows, no people, hazy calm

phrase: Then I come inside and open a laptop.
visual: the character standing beside a simple desk with an open laptop, a small dark window nearby

phrase: I'm teaching myself to code.
visual: a simple laptop with a few thin code lines on its screen, centered

phrase: I'm building things with AI,
visual: a friendly simple robot head with two round eyes and a thin antenna, centered

phrase: not because I want to leave the farm,
visual: the character at a simple fork in a path, turned toward a small farm on one side

phrase: but because the farm is exactly where that kind of building belongs.
visual: the character with one hand toward a small plant and the other toward a small laptop, balanced

phrase: The farm taught me patience.
visual: three simple stages left to right — bare soil, a sprout, a young plant — evenly spaced, no people

phrase: The code taught me precision.
visual: a simple laptop screen showing one clean thin line and a small cursor, centered

phrase: It turns out those are the same skill.
visual: two thin overlapping circles forming a simple Venn, a small leaf in one and a small cursor in the other

phrase: So why don't young people want to farm?
visual: the character standing beside a large thin question mark

phrase: Maybe the real question is,
visual: the character with a hand to its chin in thought, a thin thought bubble with a question mark above

phrase: what did we teach them to want instead?
visual: a simple open book with a thin arrow pointing from a small farm icon to a small city icon, no text

phrase: We told them the numbers were wrong.
visual: a simple price tag with a thin X drawn over it, centered, no text

phrase: We told them the soil was beneath them.
visual: the character looking down at a patch of soil at its feet, a slight frown

phrase: We never told them that what grows in the ground can grow into something entirely new.
visual: a sprout rising from a patch of soil, its thin stem turning into a few thin circuit lines near the top, one clean image

phrase: Someone grew that bowl of rice.
visual: the same bowl of rice held up by two thin hands from below, a callback to the opening

phrase: Someone who stayed when every signal told them to leave.
visual: the character standing firm and still while a few thin arrows around it point outward to the edges

phrase: The bravest generation of farmers isn't the one that planted the past.
visual: three characters standing together in an open field, a calm scene

phrase: It's the one brave enough to plant something the world hasn't seen yet.
visual: a calm field stretching to the horizon with one small figure at the center looking forward, a simple sun resting on the horizon, hopeful
